---
title: "Social Explorer"
page-layout: article
---

# Social Explorer

## Description

Interactive mapping and data platform providing demographic and census data for the United States. Supports historical, spatial, and community-level research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Social Sciences, GIS & Spatial Data, Humanities & History
- **Data/resource type:** Geospatial & Mapping Data, Historical Archives, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Geospatial & Mapping Data, Historical Archives, Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?URL=https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?URL=http://www.socialexplorer.com/)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
